aries.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today.
aries.deploy_today: Maybe — The cosmos are noncommittal. So is your CI/CD pipeline.
aries.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet today. Your Slack is not. It never is.

taurus.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today.
taurus.deploy_today: No — The universe needs rest. So does your staging environment.
taurus.prophecy: The stars offer no guidance. Your sprint board offers too much. Neither helps.

gemini.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today.
gemini.deploy_today: Yes — Stars aligned. Your feature flags are still wrong but deploy anyway.
gemini.prophecy: The universe is silent. You will fill it with three competing architecture proposals.

cancer.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today.
cancer.deploy_today: No — Cosmic signals are weak. Like your test coverage.
cancer.prophecy: Mysteries abound in the cosmos. Also in your error logs. Neither will be resolved today.

leo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today.
leo.deploy_today: Yes — The stars demand you shine. Deploy, then immediately check Datadog.
leo.prophecy: The heavens are at rest. You will still present in standup with full screen share.

virgo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today.
virgo.deploy_today: No — Mercury's position is unclear. Your rollback plan is also unclear.
virgo.prophecy: The cosmos hold their breath. You are already running lint on someone else's code.

libra.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today.
libra.deploy_today: Maybe — Balance is the theme. Push to staging. Think very hard about prod.
libra.prophecy: The stars say nothing today. You will spend forty minutes deciding which nothing to fix first.

scorpio.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today.
scorpio.deploy_today: No — Hidden forces are at work. One of them is a bug you haven't found yet.
scorpio.prophecy: The cosmos are dark and quiet. Your production logs are not. They are never quiet.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Yes — Adventurous energy. Ship it. Own the hotfix too.
sagittarius.prophecy: The universe is open to exploration. One of those explorations is a rabbit hole with no ticket.

capricorn.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today.
capricorn.deploy_today: Maybe — Discipline is rewarded. Finish the code review first. All forty-seven comments.
capricorn.prophecy: The stars are silent but disciplined. You will create a spreadsheet about the silence.

aquarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today.
aquarius.deploy_today: No — The cosmos are recalibrating. Reset your environment instead.
aquarius.prophecy: The cosmos are recalibrating. You will refactor something nobody asked you to refactor.

pisces.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today.
pisces.deploy_today: Maybe — Dreamy energy. Works in dev. Deeply unclear about prod.
pisces.prophecy: The stars offer dreams. Your diff offers 47 unresolved conflicts.
